get.description: Returns all supported chains with pagination. Chains are filtered to active status only.

Returns active opportunities with pagination, filtering and sorting. Deposit/withdrawal availability is reported per opportunity in meta. Use /opportunities/filter-options to discover valid filter and sort values.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive match on name, description or token address

schema.description: Case-insensitive match on name, description or token address

parameters.name: chainIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated numeric chain IDs (deposit tokens), e.g. '1,43114'

schema.description: Comma-separated numeric chain IDs (deposit tokens), e.g. '1,43114'

parameters.name: depositTokenSymbols
parameters.description: Comma-separated deposit token symbols (case-insensitive, OR logic)

schema.description: Comma-separated deposit token symbols (case-insensitive, OR logic)

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: One of: tvl, name, type, apr, curator, provider (defaults to tvl)

schema.description: One of: tvl, name, type, apr, curator, provider (defaults to tvl)

get.description: Returns the distinct filter dimensions (chains, providers, curators, partners, tags, lending protocols, deposit token symbols) and the valid sort options for the opportunities list.
Get combined historical time-series (TVL, share price, base APY) for a vault, bucketed by interval over [from, to].

parameters.name: step
parameters.description: Bucket width in seconds. Defaults to 86400 (1 day)

schema.description: Bucket width in seconds. Defaults to 86400 (1 day)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Unix seconds, inclusive. Defaults to endDate - 30d when omitted

schema.description: Unix seconds, inclusive. Defaults to endDate - 30d when omitted

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Unix seconds, inclusive. Defaults to now when omitted

schema.description: Unix seconds, inclusive. Defaults to now when omitted

get.description: Returns a single active opportunity by its id. Deposit/withdrawal availability is reported in meta.
Returns supported DeFi protocols with pagination. A protocol is an organization referenced as a lending protocol or vault infra provider in an earn product.
Returns active supported tokens with pagination. Optional filters: chainId (numeric) and search (partial match on address, name or symbol).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive partial match across address, name and symbol

schema.description: Case-insensitive partial match across address, name and symbol

get.summary: Get Token by Chain and Address
get.description: Returns a single active token identified by its numeric chain ID and contract address.

base.description: APR from share-price growth alone (simple, non-compound)

reward.description: Reward APR; reserved for future rewards indexing, currently always 0

base.description: APY from share-price growth alone (vaults.fyi compound formula)

reward.description: Reward APY; reserved for future rewards indexing, currently always 0

chains.description: Chains with at least one opportunity

baseAsset.description: null when the vault has no snapshots yet or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens

historyTruncated.description: true when backend hit the row cap and oldest APY values may be missing predecessors

baseAsset.description: null when the vault has no price_observations snapshots yet or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens
null when the vault has no snapshots yet or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens

apr.description: Adjacent-pair simple-rate APR against the previous bucket

blockNumber.description: On-chain block number of the snapshot chosen as the bucket representative

apy.description: Adjacent-pair compound APY against the previous bucket

blockNumber.description: On-chain block number of the snapshot chosen as the bucket representative

apy.description: Trailing-window APY at this bucket; null when no predecessor exists

blockNumber.description: On-chain block number of the snapshot chosen as the bucket representative
On-chain block number of the snapshot chosen as the bucket representative
On-chain block number of the snapshot chosen as the bucket representative

rewardType.description: Type of reward (points, tokens, yield, vesting)

usd.description: null when underlying USD price was not available for this bucket

depositDisabledReason.description: Reason deposits are disabled, if any

directInteractionEnabled.description: Whether direct interaction with the opportunity is available

isSecondaryMarket.description: Whether the opportunity can only be entered via a secondary market

routedSwapEnabled.description: Whether entering via a routed swap (through a routing provider) is supported

withdrawalDisabledReason.description: Reason withdrawals are disabled, if any

estimatedApr.description: Estimated APR (sum of active incentive yields)

receiptToken.description: Token received as receipt for deposits

id.description: Organization id (pass back as a filter value)

code.description: Tag code (pass back as the tags filter value)

chainId.description: Numeric chain ID (e.g. 1 for Ethereum, 43114 for Avalanche)
Numeric chain ID the token belongs to
